$comment: Layer A for REMIT vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image (file I/O stage 1 + WRITE ... FROM). Generated amounts span the PIC 9(7)V99 range; every generated case exercises the full file round trip (build the WS line, move it into the record, write, close, serialize) on the legacy side and the mirrored temp-file round trip on the modern side.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 REMIT (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-remit, file-serializing wrapper)
